scenario_info.title: The Road to Karendel
scenario_info.description: Having obtained the legendary treasure, three adventurers head to the trade city of Karendel for appraisal.
scenario_info.backstory: The adventurers who discovered the legendary treasure in a dungeon deep in the forest. To uncover the treasure's true nature, they head for the trade city of Karendel. Along the way, they encounter a wounded merchant party and join forces.

opening.continue: Continue from previous scenario — characters, inventory, and levels carry over.
opening.new_game: New game start — begin with level 3 characters. The dungeon has been cleared and the treasure obtained.
opening.narrative: Three adventurers obtained the legendary treasure from the forest dungeon. An ancient ornamental chest of unknown origin. On their way to the trade city of Karendel for appraisal, they discover a merchant party that was attacked by wolves on the trade road.

default_party.description: Default party for new game start (level 3)

appearance.hair: Long silver-gray hair, loosely tied back
appearance.outfit: Navy blue robe, magical charm hanging from belt
appearance.notable: Always carrying a magic staff in hand

appearance.hair: Short black hair, swept to one side
appearance.outfit: Black leather armor, two daggers at the waist
appearance.notable: Moves as if melting into the shadows

appearance.face: Strong jawline, rough but dependable appearance
appearance.outfit: Chainmail armor, iron sword on back, leather shield on left arm

appearance.hair: Short brown hair, streaks of gray
appearance.face: Gentle expression, broad face with fine wrinkles
appearance.outfit: Worn travel cloak, leather vest, wide belt
appearance.notable: Bandage mark on left arm from a wolf bite

appearance.hair: Black hair to shoulders, tied back
appearance.outfit: Light leather travel clothes, dagger sheath at waist

chapters.name: Trade Road
chapters.description: The trade road from Harun Village to Karendel. Traveling with the merchant Hallan and Mira.

chapters.name: Entering Karendel
chapters.description: The northern trade city of Karendel. A place where diverse races and merchants gather.

chapters.name: The Treasure's Secret
chapters.description: The true nature of the legendary treasure is revealed, and a new adventure begins.

endings.title: The Truth of the Treasure
endings.narrative: The true nature of the legendary treasure was revealed.

endings.title: The Beginning of a New Adventure
endings.narrative: The experiences in Karendel lead the three adventurers into a greater world.
